purpose: Spot-check / trace-to-source verification of WP-N (probes_out/wpn_tension_table.json). For each of the 9 rows, the cited free-history numbers were opened in the named source artifact at the cited JSON field path and confirmed to appear verbatim; each verdict word was checked against the artifact's own verdict field.
method: READ-ONLY. Each row's key_numbers path was resolved in the source artifact and the value compared exactly (floats compared at full committed precision; rounded prose values checked as consistent roundings). No new physics, no recomputation of any model quantity.

per_row.verdict_check: OK -- verdict.verdict_robust='FAILS'; prose 'under-predicts across the entire admissible band' matches verdict.under_prediction.b_pred_below_b_req_across_full_band=true
OK -- floor theorem 'below-mean Phi(sigma/2)>=0.5' matches z07_gap.floor_theorem.statement

checks.cited: k=0 geometry misses BIC bar by 4953

per_row.verdict_check: OK -- 'collapses to two-phase empty-void tracker' matches degeneracy_check.finding; 4953 miss internally consistent (joint_chi2 6360.18 - bar 1407.18). 'CLOSED' is the aggregation label for clears_bar=false at both k=0 and T1 ceiling; consistent, not asserted in source verbatim.

checks.found: THEORY-LEVEL CLOSE-OUT ... no consistent single-phase two-scale (constant-alpha^2) Buchert model tracks either the REQUIRED or the OBSERVED history; 6+ orders of magnitude contrast

per_row.verdict_check: OK -- '6+ orders of magnitude contrast' matches (5.41/2.2e-6 ~ 2.4e6). 'NOT a single-phase GR solution' is a faithful restatement of verdict.summary.
OK -- prose 'deep-void+wall 0.46-0.57 reaches/exceeds it' combines deep-void band lo 0.464 with best_case 0.568; 'neither refuted nor withdrawn' matches verdict_reasoning.

checks.cited: required EXCEEDS empty-Milne ceiling by x1.36

per_row.verdict_check: OK -- gate='GO' on ceiling; '4-8x short' stated in caveats[2]; x1.36 physicality strike present.
OK -- 'absolute-H0 reconciliation does NOT survive' matches self_consistency.verdict; 'SH0ES 73' matches the artifact verdict prose.

checks.found: S8 column of the tension table is UNDEFINED-IN-KINEMATIC-READING

checks.cited: reason: no delta/no D/no f; gamma~0.55 FLRW fit; Omega_m bare-vs-dressed ambiguous
checks.found: 1. No delta, no D, no f; 2. gamma~0.55 is an FLRW fit; 3. Omega_m convention-ambiguous (bare vs dressed)

checks.cited: input: sigma_m(z) BOSS DR12 count-in-cells, A=0.4443, fit to FLRW A*D(z)
checks.found: Count-in-cells on BOSS DR12; amplitude A=0.4443; fit to FLRW template sigma_m(z)=A*D(z)

per_row.verdict_check: OK -- markdown memo (no numeric JSON field), cited textually; all quoted content present. Note memo sec 3 flags source's 'reduced chi2 ~1' as loose (actual reduced chi2 ~0.22), but the table does not quote that figure, so no mis-statement is carried.
OK -- 'r_hom*=140 OUTSIDE [80,120] and at/beyond 2M++ ~137.5 -- excluded' matches r_hom_star.note.

notes: All 9 rows: every quoted free-history number resolves verbatim (full committed precision) to the cited JSON field path in the named source artifact; all rounded prose values (x1.16, x3.31, ~152%, ~5x, +36%, ~0.16, x1.36, 199.6) are faithful roundings of the underlying committed values.

All 8 verdict words trace to their artifact's own verdict/gate field: FAILS (bpred verdict.verdict_robust), SHAPE-UNAVAILABLE (R2_final verdict), TRACKS + clears_bar=false (threephase), THEORY-LEVEL CLOSE-OUT (wpb verdict.summary), MARGINAL (contrast_budget verdict), GO (q_budget gate), R1_survives=false (wpc), UNDEFINED-IN-KINEMATIC-READING (NOTES_growth). No mis-stated verdict found.
Two source artifacts are correctly located in the paper-2 sibling repo (R2_final.json, contrast_budget.json); the other seven are in the tensions repo, matching the table's 'sources' map.

Self-inflicted tally recomputed independently from the rows: 6 YES / 2 partial / 1 target = 9, matching the reported tally (the corrected count; an earlier 'five' miscount noted in the build summary is not present in the committed artifact).

The LCDM-status column entries (e.g. '~5sigma / dchi2~25', 'fits (~2-3sigma)', 'computed from early physics', 'consistent GR') are contextual LCDM-side descriptors, not free-history numbers, and are outside the trace-to-source scope of this verification.

Row-3 T1_deltaBIC_vs_LCDM: artifact carries both k4_sensitivity_accounting.T1_deltaBIC_vs_LCDM=136.42019222761886 and T1_ceiling_miss_vs_k4_bar=136.42019222761883 (differ in last digit); the table quotes the former (136.42019222761886) -- correct field, exact match.
